title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.015
text:
*9.015.  Federal holidays, no ban or restriction on, when. — No state or local governmental entity, public building, public park, public school, or public setting or place shall ban or otherwise restrict the practice, mention, celebration, or discussion of any federal holiday.
(L. 2013 H.B. 278) 
*Effective 10-11-13, see § 21.250.  H.B. 278 was vetoed July 1, 2013. The veto was overridden on September 11, 2013.
